mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE deleted = 0) as total_students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teachers WHERE deleted = 0) as total_teachers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admins WHERE deleted = 0) as total_admins, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs) as total_logs
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admins WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teachers WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
